hero.tagline: Bata kamwe uwane mutambo wako unotevera.

roles.heading: App imwe kune munhu wese
roles.subheading: Kana uchida kungoona, kupinda mumutambo, kana kutungamira – Footeee inokubatsira.

guest.title: Muenzi
guest.description: Ona zvinhu zvakanaka zvebhora pahusiku hwako.
guest.longDescription: Ona mitambo yose iri kuuya, mashoko enzvimbo, uye vatambi varipo – zvose pasina akaunti. Zvakanakira vanoda bhora.

player.title: Mutambi
player.description: Mutambo wako unotevera uri mumaminitsi mashoma chete!
player.longDescription: Pinda mumitambo nekubata kamwe, ona kuti ndiani ari kutamba, uye gamuchira mashoko kana nzvimbo yavhurika kana mutambo wava kutanga.

manager.title: Mutungamiri
manager.description: Rega Footeee ichengetedze nyika yako yebhora!
manager.longDescription: Kutonga kwakakwana kwemitambo, matimu, nevatambi. Gadzira mitambo, sarudza matimu, tevera kuuya, uye tungamira nharaunda yako yebhora.

privacy.title: Mutemo wekuchengetedzwa
privacy.intro: Footeee ("isu", "yedu") inoshandisa app yeFooteee yefoni ("App") newebhusaiti iyi. Mutemo uyu wekuchengetedzwa unotsanangura mashandisirwo anoitwa neni pakuunganidza, kushandisa, kugoverana, uye kuchengetedza mashoko ako paunenge uchishandisa App nemasevhisi anoenderana nayo.
privacy.section1Item1: Mashoko eakaunti (somuenzaniso: zita, kero ye-imeyiri, mashoko ekupinda akachengetedzwa).
privacy.section1Item2: Mashoko ekushandisa app (somuenzaniso: mitambo yaunogadzira/yaupinda, matimu, nzvimbo, nezvimwe).
privacy.section1Item3: Mashoko echigadzirwa/etekinoroji (somuenzaniso: rudzi rwechigadzirwa, vhezheni yeOS, vhezheni yeapp, zvekuongorora).
privacy.section2Item2: Kupa masevhisi akuru akaita sekugadzira mitambo, kupinda, nekutungamira matimu.
privacy.section3Text: Tinogona kugoverana mashoko chete sezvinodiwa kuti sevhisi ishande, kutevera mitemo, kana kuchengetedza kodzero nekuchengeteka. Somuenzaniso, tinogona kushandisa vatariri veinfurasitiraikucha (kuhodha, imeyiri, nezvimwe) vanoshandisa mashoko pamusoro pedu nekuchengetedzwa kwakakodzera.
privacy.section4Text: Tinoshandisa nzira dzakanaka dzetekinoroji nekuronga kuchengetedza mashoko ako (somuenzaniso: HTTPS, kutonga kupinda). Hapana nzira yekutumira kana kuchengeta iri 100% yakachengeteka, saka hatigoni kuvimbisa kuchengeteka kuzere.
privacy.section5Text: Tinochengeta mashoko ega chero bedzi zvichidiwa kuti sevhisi ipihwe uye nezvikonzero zvakakodzera zvebhizinesi (somuenzaniso: kutevera mitemo, kuchengeteka, kugadzirisa nharo), kunze kwekuti mutemo unosunungura nguva yakareba.
privacy.section6Text: Zvichibva panzvimbo yako (kusanganisira UK/EU), unogona kuva nekodzero yekuwana, kugadzirisa, kudzima, kana kudzivisa kushandiswa kwemashoko ako ega, uye kukumbira kufambiswa. Kuti ushandise kodzero idzi, tibate.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee haisi yevana vari pasi pemakore 13. Hatiiti nemaune kuunganidza mashoko ega evana vari pasi pemakore 13.
privacy.section8Text: Tinogona kugadzirisa mutemo uyu panguva nenguva. Shanduko dzinoiswa papeji iyi nezuva idzva re"Yakagadziridzwa kupedzisira".

deleteData.title: Dzima Mashoko Angu
deleteData.description: Une kodzero yekukumbira kudzimwa kweakaunti yako nemashoko ega anoenderana nayo. Tinoita zvikumbiro mumazuva 30.
deleteData.successMessage: Chikumbiro chako chagadzirwa. Tumira imeyiri yakavhurwa muapp yako ye-imeyiri. Tichazviita mumazuva 30.
deleteData.scopeFull: Zvose — dzima akaunti yangu nemashoko ose
deleteData.scopeData: Mashoko chete — chengetedza akaunti asi dzima mashoko ezvaiitwa
deleteData.confirmLabel: Ndinonzwisisa kuti chiito ichi hachigoni kudzoswa.
deleteData.emailRequired: Ndapota nyora imeyiri yakabatanidzwa neakaunti yako.
